data.body: AC5 [operator-attested] MET: flag activated in reconcile-bridge.yml via Gerrit change 810, MERGED to origin/main as c357b8e5d. Confirmed: REBAR_RECONCILER_FAIL_SILENT_NOOP: "1" is present in the 'Run reconciler' step env (reconcile-bridge.yml:249 on origin/main). Sequenced AFTER the bd80 Jira cleanup (all 13 tickets below cap), so the flag won't fail on capped-ticket comment_errors. All 5 ACs now met: (1-4) apply_handlers.py partial-comment-drop promotion + comments/labels canary coverage + tests landed in df0ac80be/change 785 (RED->GREEN verified, full suite green); (5) flag active via 810.
